title: Cream Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by reentrancy attack on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls borrow() after a flash loan in the same tx

red_flags: nested borrow() function during token transfer
use of flash loans to fund reentrancy attacks
summary: Cream Finance suffered a $18.8M loss due to a reentrancy vulnerability exploited through a flash loan. A hacker nested a second borrow() function inside a token transfer, allowing them to withdraw more funds than initially lent.
